# Q 

2 

M 

RESTARTWASH

## Exterior / maintenance

### Shampoo that restores coating performance.

Q²M RestartWash is a concentrated shampoo designed to cleanse coated surfaces and restore their original performance. Over time, contamination builds up on coatings, limiting their hydrophobic behavior. Q²M RestartWash removes this contamination efficiently, helping coatings regain their initial water behaviour and self-cleaning properties.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_restart-wash_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Restart wash for coated cars. Brings initial hydrophobic properties back.

Q²M RestartWash combines washing and decontamination in one step. It removes road film and embedded contamination that regular shampoos cannot, allowing ceramic coatings to perform as intended without adding extra protection layers.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons49.svg)

PH NEUTRAL 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons15.svg)

REMOVES CONTAMINANTS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons70.svg)

SLICKNESS FOR A SMOOTH WASH 

what makes

Q2M RESTARTWASH so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/restartwash3-606x1024.jpg)

Cleanse and decontaminates coated surfaces in one wash

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mrestartwash.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML

Consumption

20-30ml/car

PH LEVEL

6

DILUTION

1:200

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

RESTARTWASH

01
Rinse the vehicle thoroughly to remove loose dirt. 

02
Dilute Q²M RestartWash according to the recommended ratio. 

03
Wash using a soft wash mitt and proper technique. 

04
Rinse thoroughly with clean water. 

05
Dry the vehicle using a suitable drying towel. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M RestartWash safe for ceramic coatings? 

Yes. It is designed specifically for coated surfaces.

02
Does it add hydrophobic protection? 

No. It restores existing coating performance without adding protection.

03
Can it remove iron contamination? 

Yes. It contains iron removing components.

04
How often should it be used? 

As needed, avoid using in direct sunlight or hot panels.

05
Can it be used as foam? 

Yes. It can be used as foam or as a traditional shampoo.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/5740847467281-Q-M-RestartWash)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
